wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
subject:wikidata and subject:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because subject:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q1388469 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Ambrosio O'Higgins, 1st Marquis of Osorno to en:Ambrosio O'Higgins, 1st Marquess of Osorno
Ambrosio and Bernado O'Higgins - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q983030 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Theobald Mathew (temperance reformer) to en:Father Mathew
Theobald Mathew - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(1409997594)['subject:wikidata'='Q1388469']['subject:wikipedia'='en:Ambrosio O\'Higgins, 1st Marquis of Osorno']; node(603833919)['subject:wikidata'='Q983030']['subject:wikipedia'='en:Theobald Mathew (temperance reformer)']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags']

JOSM Wikipedia plugin
